wordplay_note: A stronghold that crumbles — she too commits suicide
card_description: Kirsten Lundborg (meaning "Lundborg = castle on the grove") is a character in Philip K. Dick's *The Transmigration of Timothy Archer*. Bishop Archer's mistress and theological sparring partner who kills herself. Name note: A stronghold that crumbles — she too commits suicide. Another casualty of the search for ultimate meaning. First appears in *The Transmigration of Timothy Archer*.

reference.brief: Bishop Archer's mistress and theological sparring partner who kills herself
reference.significance: Another casualty of the search for ultimate meaning
